page.title: Future Continuous vs Future Perfect Continuous
page.subtitle_html: Future Continuous shows what will be happening at a future moment, and Future Perfect Continuous shows what will have been happening for some time by that future moment.
page.subtitle_text: Future Continuous = will be + V-ing for a process at a future moment; Future Perfect Continuous = will have been + V-ing for duration or process up to a future moment.
tags: Future Continuous vs Future Perfect Continuous
base_tags: Future Continuous vs Future Perfect Continuous
